description: Native Hugging Face Rust tokenizers static library used to test parity-correct Go tokenizer bindings for the opt-in ONNX backend. This manifest is tracked; the native binary is not tracked.

library.upstream: Hugging Face tokenizers Rust library via daulet/tokenizers release asset

artifact.storage_note: Local development artifact downloaded from the daulet/tokenizers release asset during M012/M013. Future CI/Docker use must download or cache this artifact and verify checksum before tagged builds. Do not commit the binary to git.

linking.default_build_requirement: Default fd API builds must not require this artifact. The native tokenizer path must remain opt-in via build tags or equivalent isolation.

failure_contract.missing_file: Tagged/native tokenizer builds must fail with an actionable message naming the configured library directory and expected libtokenizers.a filename.
failure_contract.checksum_mismatch: Fail before build/test use with expected and actual sha256; do not run parity or ONNX comparisons with an unverified native library.
failure_contract.wrong_platform: Fail when os/architecture does not match the manifest platform.
failure_contract.default_build_dependency: Default builds must fail the milestone gate if they require this native artifact without an explicit opt-in tag.
failure_contract.raw_text_logging: Never log raw tokenizer probe text while validating native artifact or parity artifacts.

future_gates_before_runtime_integration: Documented local setup command to download and verify libtokenizers.a into .gsd/runtime/tokenizers/linux-amd64/
Build-tagged Go tokenizer implementation that imports github.com/daulet/tokenizers only for opt-in builds
Docker and CI path for supplying libtokenizers.a without committing it
Isolated-cache TEI-vs-ONNX cosine comparison after runtime integration

source_contract.note: Pinned release asset replaces mutable latest URL for future provisioning inputs. Default builds remain artifact-free.
